responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX project media mixing (Perez showing Casa Rosario photos), restore landing reels, create one canonical project data source — AND eliminate all fake deployment narratives by enforcing an evidence-first 12-state deployment state machine with 18 required evidence fields.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public)
- Backend live at `https://ivx26-backend.rork.app/` (also `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`)
- Public landing live at `https://ivxholding.com` (S3 bucket, deployed via `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` using AWS credentials)
- Supabase: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co`, anon key `eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imt2Y2xjZGptamdobmR4c25nZnpiIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxOTQwMjcsImV4cCI6MjA4ODc3MDAyN30.OLDwa21VHQNs151AD-8k--_HigQ2d-N7yJfFn5UeNPk`
- **IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER STANDARD**: every completed task must include 12-point evidence; no placeholders, no narrative templates, no success claims without real tool execution evidence
- **NEW mandatory deployment state machine (owner spec 2026-07-11)**: REPO_FROZEN→CODE_CHANGED→FILES_MODIFIED→LOCAL_BUILD→TESTS_PASSED→COMMIT_CREATED→PUSH_COMPLETED→DEPLOY_STARTED→DEPLOY_IN_PROGRESS→DEPLOY_COMPLETED→HEALTH_CHECK_OK→PRODUCTION_VERIFIED — no state may be skipped
- **NEW prohibited narrative phrases** (blocked unless backed by real evidence): "Deployment successful", "Build completed", "Changes applied", "Production updated", "Health check passed", "Live on Render", "Successfully deployed", "Fix complete"
- **NEW forbidden evidence values**: AUTO-GENERATED, UNKNOWN, PENDING, PLACEHOLDER, MOCK, NARRATIVE, GENERATED, SIMULATED, ESTIMATED, ASSUMED — any field containing these → FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED
- **NEW 18 required evidence fields**: repository, branch, commitSha, previousCommitSha, filesChanged, linesAdded, linesRemoved, pushStatus, deploymentPlatform, deploymentId, deploymentStatus, deploymentTimestamp, productionUrl, healthEndpoint, httpStatus, runningCommitSha, runtimeVersion, verificationTime + qaResult
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key — only Vercel access
- Workspace project ID `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` is Swift — cannot preview React Native app from sandbox
- User demands real production evidence; any missing proof must be marked UNVERIFIED

## Progress
### Done
- **IVX IA gate fix — code complete, locally verified (NOT deployed)**:
  - Gate test suite: 23/23 PASS; backend test suite: 812/812 PASS; TypeScript: 0 backend errors
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — gate: blocks placeholders unconditionally, blocks DEPLOYED/LIVE/VERIFIED claims without evidence
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` — gate wired at line 567 in `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` (all 26 answer paths)
  - `backend/services/ivx-developer-execution-guard.ts` — placeholder rejection added
  - `backend/services/ivx-senior-developer-narrative-gate.ts` — 8 forbidden markers added
- **Prior production state**: commit `d35db8b99cf4370e98e13564a8b8563ff43e458a` live on Render (HTTP 200, `/version` confirmed); gate fix NOT deployed
- **Phase 1 audit COMPLETE — root cause identified**:
  - `jv_deals` table uses TEXT ids: `perez-residence-001`, `casa-rosario-001`, `JV-202603-5190`
  - `project_media` table uses UUID `project_id` — ALL 14 rows are orphans; none reference real jv_deals
  - `project_videos` table: all 17 rows orphaned, all `is_approved=false`
  - No `jv_deal_media` or `jv_deal_reels` tables exist yet (jv_deal_reels returns HTTP 404)
  - Frontend compensated with hardcoded fallback arrays where `PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS` contained Casa Rosario's R2 URLs
  - Landing page had 4 duplicate copies of fallback arrays
  - Hardcoded `ownership_text` values in landing didn't match dynamic calculation from app
  - Perez `propertyValue` was 2500000 in landing but `estimated_value` is 3125000 in DB
  - Casa Rosario had `display_order=1` (same as Perez) — duplicate
  - IVX Jacksonville had embedded base64 data-URI photo in `photos` JSONB
- **Phase 2-6 code changes MADE and LOCALLY VERIFIED**:
  - `expo/constants/deal-photos.ts` — PEREZ_RESIDENCE_PHOTOS replaced with 8 correct Supabase storage URLs from `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/` folder
  - `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html` — all 4 fallback arrays replaced; localStorage cache integrity guard added; hardcoded ownership_text removed; Perez sale_price corrected to 3125000; NEW reels section added (fetches jv_deal_reels, falls back to project_videos approved-only, dedupes, empty state, per-item error isolation)
  - `expo/deploy/supabase/ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` — NEW migration: creates `jv_deal_media` + `jv_deal_reels` tables with FK to `jv_deals(id)`, data corrections, `ivx_project_integrity` view; **UPDATED** with Casa Rosario tour reel seed (video/thumb/poster all verified HTTP 200)
- **Phase 7 integrity tests COMPLETE — 9/9 PASS, 43 assertions**:
  - `expo/__tests__/deal-photo-integrity.test.ts` — Perez/Casa disjointness, cross-mapping blocked, fallback lookup safety, 0.0016% ownership parity, clamping
- **Phase 8 audit + QA COMPLETE (local)**:
  - `expo/scripts/project-integrity-audit.mjs` — ran against production: 3 projects, 0 duplicate slugs, 14/14 orphan media, 17/17 orphan videos, Casa Rosario 0 valid photos (FAIL), duplicate display_order 1/1, Jacksonville 1 data-URI photo, jv_deal_reels 404
  - Full test suite: **311/311 pass** (1 pre-existing playwright e2e loader error excluded); `tsc --noEmit`: **0 errors**
  - Production URLs verified: casa tour video HTTP 200, casa thumb HTTP 200, casa poster HTTP 200, perez photo-0 HTTP 200, casa r2 photo HTTP 200
  - Backend `/version` confirmed: commit `d35db8b9`, bootTime `2026-07-10T19:19:23.089Z`
- **NEW: Deployment narrative elimination — Step 1-4 code changes MADE (not yet tested)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-claim-gate.ts` — **UPDATED**: added 7 prohibited narrative phrases (Deployment successful, Successfully deployed, Build completed, Changes applied, Production updated, Live on Render, Fix complete); added forbidden evidence value regex covering AUTO-GENERATED/UNKNOWN/PENDING/PLACEHOLDER/MOCK/NARRATIVE/GENERATED/SIMULATED/ESTIMATED/ASSUMED in evidence fields
  - `backend/services/ivx-deployment-state-machine.ts` — **NEW FILE**: 12-state machine (`DEPLOYMENT_STATES`), `advanceDeploymentState()` (no-skip enforcement), `FORBIDDEN_EVIDENCE_VALUES` (13 values), `isForbiddenEvidenceValue()`, `DeploymentEvidenceReport` type (18 fields + qaResult), `validateDeploymentEvidence()` (returns VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED with missingFields/forbiddenValues/failures), `formatDeploymentReport()` (Step 9 final report, missing=UNVERIFIED), `isRealCommitSha()` (7-40 hex), `commitShasMatch()` (prefix equality)

### In Progress
- **Deployment state machine — needs tests + typecheck + wiring into backend**: `ivx-deployment-state-machine.ts` created but NOT yet tested, NOT yet typechecked, NOT yet wired into `ivx-enterprise-deployment-engine.ts` or `ivx-owner-ai.ts`
- **Phase 2-3: SQL migration needs to be applied** — `ivx-canonical-media-reels.sql` written but NOT executed (requires Supabase service-role key; anon key can't create tables or update rows due to RLS)

### Blocked
- **GitHub push blocked — NO valid token**: sandbox `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var is empty; Worker's stored token (`ghp_****QTOt`) is revoked (401 Bad credentials, re-verified 2026-07-11T00:59Z); 6+ device-flow codes expired unanswered; user has not authorized any device code
- **Supabase schema changes blocked** — anon key cannot create tables or update rows (RLS); need service-role key or Supabase dashboard SQL editor access
- **Landing deploy blocked** — `expo/deploy-landing.mjs` requires `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` + `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` env vars; not present in sandbox
- **Cannot run Expo Go on Android from sandbox** — no Android emulator/device
- **Render API key exposed in prior chat**: `rnd_1H0XCquMZQTRyAnHgbEv8dVWYPVs` should be rotated

## Key Decisions
- localtunnel permanently retired — replaced with Expo official `--tunnel`
- `IvxBufferLike` extends `Uint8Array` to satisfy `crypto.createHash().update()` type constraint
- `tsconfig.json` excludes `backend/**`, `server.ts`, `e2e/**`
- Shared-store fix: single `ChatStorage` instance (`publicChatStorage`) from `backend/hono.ts` passed to `attachChatRealtime`
- Deployment claim gate at `assertVisibleOwnerAIAnswer()` line 567 — universal choke point for all 26 answer paths
- Gate marker labels prefixed with "fabricated" to avoid self-leakage
- **Media mixing root cause**: `jv_deals` uses TEXT ids but `project_media`/`project_videos` use UUID `project_id` — no FK relationship possible; all media/video rows are orphans; frontends used hardcoded title-matched fallback arrays where Perez got Casa Rosario's URLs
- **Perez photos corrected** to 8 Supabase storage URLs under `deal-photos/perez-residence-001/`
- **Ownership values**: hardcoded `ownership_text` removed from landing; both app and landing now use dynamic `(minInvestment / salePrice) * 100` calculation; Perez `sale_price` corrected to 3125000 → 0.0016% everywhere
- **Reels architecture**: new `jv_deal_reels` table (FK to `jv_deals.id`) as canonical source; landing JS fetches it first, falls back to `project_videos` (approved only)
- **Canonical schema**: `jv_deal_media` table with `project_id TEXT FK→jv_deals(id)`, `is_cover`, `is_shared`, `sort_order`, `published`; unique index on `public_url` for non-shared media
- **Deployment state machine is pure + deterministic** (no I/O, network, or AI) — fully unit-testable; `validateDeploymentEvidence()` checks all 18 fields, forbidden values, HTTP 200, commit SHA match, push status, deployment status, and QA result
- **Casa Rosario tour reel**: video at `https://ivxholding.com/videos/original/b8788d0c-0558-43fb-a3dd-4ccdc6f441c8/casa
